Ramon benchmark for Z3
-
Job description: QF_LIA, all random, int_hammer_period=6
Job tag: lia_w_rand_p6_qflia_dio_increase_600_rs_142
Runner: rise-runner-2
Z3 repo: Z3Prover/z3
Z3 commit: 9f290ca0b87c24712a4949e6d43bfb06dc85e6e3
Z3 branch: lia_w
Z3 options: "-T:600 smt.random_seed=142 lp.random_hammers=true lp.int_hammer_period=6"
Z3 inputs: https://zenodo.org/records/16740866/files/QF_LIA.tar.zst?download=1
Z3 commit message: lp: linearly recover dio_calls_period on missed dio calls

Increment dio_calls_period by one on each call where the diophantine
solver is not triggered (until it returns to the initial period),
gradually re-enabling dio solving after it was backed off, instead of
leaving the period at its doubled value indefinitely.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

</pre>
